title: Les Aristocrates
writer: Roland Laudenbach, Michel de Saint-Pierre, Denys de La Patellière
actors: Pierre Fresnay, Brigitte Auber, François Guérin
plot: In Burgundy area, the Marquis De Maubrun, worthy heir of the aristocratic virtues and traditions, reigns over his family and estate. But wind of revolt is about to blow above Maubrun's head.
